name: nodeslide
description: NodeSlide — reviewable deck-as-code. Every AI edit is a scoped, validated, receipted proposal.

scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.proof: npm run test && npm run proof:external-agent
scripts.build: npm run packages:build && tsc -b && vite build
scripts.packages:build: npm run build --workspace @nodeslide/contracts && npm run build --workspace @nodeslide/engine && npm run build --workspace @nodeslide/backend && npm run build --workspace @nodeslide/testing && npm run build --workspace @nodeslide/agent && npm run build --workspace @nodeslide/client-http && npm run build --workspace @nodeslide/react-headless && npm run build --workspace @nodeslide/react && npm run build --workspace @nodeslide/convex && npm run build --workspace @nodeslide/registry && npm run build --workspace @nodeslide/cli && npm run build --workspace @nodeslide/external-agent && npm run build --workspace nodeslide-mcp
